text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's New Year's Day, and also the beginning of our
classic year. Yaeno Muteki and her friends invited
Bamboo Memory to join them for the year's first
shrine visit, and I'm accompanying them.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We're finally in our classic year! We've got to
start strong!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Let's pray that we all find success on our
paths.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Are there any races you've got your eyes on this
year, Bamboo?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
My trainer and I discussed it, and we decided to
have a training arc until spring! So, I'm not aiming
for any particular race right now!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
In other words, depending on what we choose, I
could very well end up racing any of you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I certainly hope we can go all out when
that time comes.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
For sure! Just thinking about is getting me fired
up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she says, it's likely that Bamboo Memory will
end up racing Yaeno Muteki and the others.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And watching her chat with them so casually right
now makes me want to see it happen all the more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But there's just one problem...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: It looks like it's our turn. Are you all ready?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'm gonna pray so hard!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki, Sakura Chiyono O, and Mejiro
Ardan are all primarily medium-distance racers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's likely they'll all go on to compete in the
Classic Triple Crown tour. But at this moment, I
feel like Bamboo Memory is more suited for
sprints and miles.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That means she might have to pass up on having
any big races with her friends, and walk her own
path without them.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt in my mind! One day, I'm gonna
have the ultimate showdown with the ultimate
rivals!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's what Bamboo Memory shouted at the
sunset that day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yet, the road ahead of us might be one that leads
away from that dream...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Are you okay, Trainer? Do you feel sick or
something?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wonder how Bamboo Memory herself feels about
the road ahead of us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she wants to take the same path as her friends
and run in medium-distances...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then we should keep our options open until
spring. With that in mind, I pray the two of us
have a successful classic year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After we're done at the shrine, we all head back
to the academy. We don't have any training
scheduled, but...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: TIME TO GET TO WORK!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
There's a lot that the disciplinary committee
needs to get done for the new year, so that's what
I'm gonna do today!
choice_data_list: You're starting off the new year strong!
You're starting off the new year strong!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Of course! It's no stretch to say that your path for
the year starts with your very first step! To that
end...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to take my training, racing, and my
work for the disciplinary committee to the next
level this year!
choice_data_list: Anything I can do to help?
Anything I can do to help?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Really?! You want to help?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I need to gather a bit more information to help
decide what we should do from here. I assume she
doesn't need my help with anything, but I offer
just in c—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! This is WONDERFUL!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So you've realized the importance of starting
things out on the right foot! I'm absolutely thrilled
to hear that!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
In that case, we gotta move quick and maintain
that discipline! Here, take this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory hands me a paper filled margin
to margin with tasks for the day!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Pick something from this list that you're willing to
work on! Let's do it together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
A classic choice! There's no way to keep discipline
if we don't patrol!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
A lot of the students who stay here for the
holidays end up getting careless and breaking
some rules! Let's keep the campus safe and
orderly!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: We'll start out with fifty laps around the academy!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Burn bright, Bamboo Memory! New Year's style!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get a very clear picture of Bamboo Memory's
passion for her work on the disciplinary
committee as I accompany her on patrol.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hm! I didn't expect you to jump right into
something so advanced! Nice pick, Trainer!
choice_data_list:
I know I picked this... but what are we doing,
exactly?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Lax discipline lead to a lax mentality! In reverse
now—a lax mentality leads to lax discipline!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
As someone charged with keeping discipline, I
have to keep both my mind and heart clear!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's close our eyes and clear our minds for
an hour!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get some great insight into both Bamboo
Memory's surprising power of concentration and
her passion for her work on the disciplinary
committee.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: School rules and discipline are one and the same!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I knew you would understand the importance of
reviewing the rules in order to reinforce our own
sense of discipline at the beginning of a new year!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right! Let's start with my usual method for
reviewing the school rules!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Brute force memorization!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
By the end of the day, I want you to have them so
well memorized that you can recite them without
looking, just like me!
choice_data_list: By the end of the day?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Next! "The tail hole for uniforms shall not be any
larger than specified. Exceptions may be
permitted as physical circumstances necessitate."
choice_data_list:
Th-the tail hole for uniforms shall not be any
larger...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Memorizing the school rules helps me better
understand Bamboo Memory's passion for her
work on the disciplinary committee.
